title: Smoky Velvety Dutch Rice Noodles
description: A weeknight-friendly Dutch dish featuring flat rice noodles, smoky flavor, and a velvety texture. Perfect for a quick dinner solution.
instructions: Heat the smoked paprika infused oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until caramelized, about 8 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the caraway seeds, thyme, salt, and pepper, and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 8 minutes.
Stir in the heavy cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the smoky velvety Dutch rice noodles hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Cook the flat rice noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss to combine with the smoky sauce.
